title: Student Journey Through a Secure Semester-End Examination Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the secure data handling lifecycle for a digital exam, from student authentication to final grade release and data archival, highlighting key privacy and security controls at each stage.
elements: Final Grade Calculation & Student Record Update
Secure Data Archival / Anonymized Data Purge
relationships: Student logs in (Multi-Factor Auth) to access the exam platform
Platform delivers exam; answers are encrypted in transit and at rest
Encrypted answers are temporarily stored in a secure database
Objective answers are auto-graded; subjective answers are sent for manual grading
Instructor grades subjective answers within a secured portal
All grades are compiled, validated, and posted to the student's official record
Post-grading, exam data is either archived under strict access controls or anonymized and purged according to data retention policies
